title: Harvest & Forge
description: Harvest and forge is a pack that combines advanced crafting, technological innovation, and expansive world exploration, creating an  journey of creation and discovery across transformed landscapes and cosmic frontiers.
body:
# What does this modpack offer?
- 🌎 Overhauled Biomes (Nature's Spirit)
- ⚙️ Create and Create Addons (Create Mod)
- 🚀 Space (AD astra)
- 🏕️ Custom Structures (Additional Structures, MVS, Towns and Towers, and More!)
- 🏡 Many More Blocks to Build With (Chipped, Handcrafted, Macaw's mods, and more!)
- 📷 Photography (Exposure)
- ❤️ Revamped Health and Hunger System (Spice of Life: Valheim Edition)
- 🍞 Many New Plants and Foods (Farmer's Delight and Farmer's Delight Addons)
- 🎯 Bounty Quests (Bountiful)
- 🎒 Backpacks (Sophisticated Backpacks)
- 🫎 New Animals (Naturalist)
- 🔊 Custom Sounds (AmbientSounds, Sound Physics Remastered, and Sounds)
- 🍲 [Let's Do] Mods (Vinery, Candlelight, and more!)
- 🌋 Evolved Nether (Better Nether, Nether Depths Upgrade, and Formations Nether)
- 🔮 Revamped End (Better End, Better End Cities Vanilla, End Remastered, and Ender Dragon Fight Remastered)

<details>
<summary>Future Plans</summary>
Updates:

  2. Questing Update. (Next)

  2. Update for servers. (Better voice chat and discord intergration)
   
   3. Update for create 6.0. (When the fabric port updates)
   
   4. Valkyrien Skies & Eureka Update (Would need lots of testing)
   
   5. Winter themed update. (Make it always snowing for winter months and add some other fun challenges)
</details>
